form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (24.50) at this track in a Grade 4, finishing eighth and beaten 7 lengths. Super consistent from the draw with a win and two places from three starts. Looks a key chance on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Dragged down from behind entering the back straight.

form.formComment: Comes off a (23.95) win last time, scoring by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 6 over 407m at this track. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (24.58) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 17 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Strong performance leading throughout to score by a neck in a Mix 5 last start at this track, clocking a slick 23.76 over the 407m trip. In form and worth thought again.
